steps.title: Substitute x = 8 into the function
steps.content:
We have $g(x) = 10x + 8$ and need to find $g(8)$. Substitute $x = 8$ into the function:
$$g(8) = 10(8) + 8$$

steps.title: Simplify to find the result
steps.content:
Evaluate the arithmetic:
$$g(8) = 80 + 8 = 88$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
